tweets.text:
Plus: execute_code on remote backends, Firecrawl cloud browser, Browser Use provider, xAI prompt caching, thinking prefill continuation, cron script injection, Telegram reactions, shared thread sessions, Supermemory memory provider, notify_on_complete for background processes, Nous free-tier model gating, and much more.

Full release notes: https://t.co/8MNQkGBbB0

Update with 'hermes update'

x.name: Modal
x.bio:
AI infrastructure that developers love 💚

Run inference, sandboxes, batch processing, training, and many other things on Modal

tweets.text:
We partnered with @Zai_org to bring GLM-5.1 to Modal. Free to try as an endpoint for the next month.

GLM-5.1 further improves upon GLM-5's coding abilities and long-horizon effectiveness. https://t.co/dGswF60tYh

tweets.text:
a new @AnthropicAI engineering blog post on Claude Managed Agents, our hosted agent in the Claude API. 
we share lessons from building a system that scales with Claude's capability. was a pleasure writing this with @mc_anthropic, @gcemaj, and @jkeatn. 

https://t.co/y8BLIoUwJO

a great way to get started is to use our skill, built into Claude Code. get the latest Claude Code release:
 
$ claude update

then start Claude Code and run our subcommand:
$ claude
/claude-api managed-agents-onboarding https://t.co/1eXmIb6RpN
